summary: Recap: A minimal, browser-based dashboard to track the upcoming Knicks schedule and Jalen Brunson's recent scoring trends. Chosen prototype: Minimal Data Dashboard using static local fixtures. Acceptance checks: Local data loads deterministically, L5 and L3 averages calculate accurately (31.2 and 33.7 respectively), threshold flag activates at >= 30 points, tone remains neutral and factual, and UK spelling is applied throughout.
